taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Cloud Engineer
core_skills: PHP, Relational databases, SQL, SaaS application deployment, operation
skill_match_scores: PHP:0.5, Relational databases:1.0, SQL:1.0, SaaS application deployment:0.0, Operation:0.0
must_have_quals: Degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or a related field, 3 – 6 years of professional software development experience, Proficiency with PHP (or a similar interpreted language) and relational databases (SQL/RDBMS), Experience deploying and operating SaaS applications, Experience building RESTful Web Services and integrating APIs, Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines, Git (including hosted providers like GitLab), and Jira (or other issue-tracking systems), Solid understanding of software design principles and patterns, Effective communication skills and the ability to work collaboratively in a cross-functional team, Passion for learning, continuous improvement, and delivering quality software
preferred_quals: Experience with AWS, Exposure to automated testing frameworks (Unit, Integration, and/or End-to-End), Experience with performance optimization and monitoring tools
core_responsibilities: Design, develop, and maintain cloud-based software solutions in an agile environment, Write clean, maintainable, and testable code following industry best practices, Participate in architecture and design discussions for new applications and features, Collaborate with Product Management to review requirements and contribute to estimation and planning, Build and integrate APIs and modern front-end components using technologies such as JavaScript and PHP, Contribute to continuous integration and deployment pipelines (CI/CD) for timely, consistent delivery, Write and maintain automated tests, including unit and integration testing, Monitor application health and support production issues in collaboration with other teams, Contribute ideas for technical improvements and process efficiency across the SDLC
job_summary: Extensiv is a visionary technology leader focused on creating the future of omnichannel fulfillment. They are seeking a Software Engineer to help build the next generation of their cloud-based fulfillment technology, working on scalable SaaS applications for modern eCommerce.
